label: Lantern Stockroom
description: Lantern Stockroom occupies a pressure-rated compartment behind the Index Lantern’s partitioned seating bays, built of black composite panels strapped to radiant conductor-ribs. Transit indices are stamped into the doorframe and shelf-ends as inventory marks, aligning stores with Continuum Anchorage’s causality-safe handling codes. Modular racks and sealed crates dominate the floor plan, while acoustic baffles and gasketed seams preserve the tavern’s steady, unvarying gloom. A narrow service counter in polished conductor-metal provides a durable staging surface for rotated supplies and station-standard containers.
